Postgres.FetchPendingEventsQuery: SELECT id, event_type, payload_json, occurred_at FROM outbox_events WHERE status = 'Pending' ORDER BY id LIMIT @batchSize
Postgres.MarkEventProcessedCommand: UPDATE outbox_events SET status = 'Processed', published_at = NOW() WHERE id = @id
Postgres.ResolveChampionshipByMatchIdQuery: SELECT championshipid FROM matches WHERE id = @matchId
Postgres.BuildStandingsJsonQuery: SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(t)), '[]'::json)::text FROM ( SELECT c.championshipid AS "championshipId", c.teamid AS "teamId", c.position, c.points, tm.name, tm.emblem FROM classifications c JOIN teams tm ON tm.id = c.teamid WHERE c.championshipid = @championshipId ORDER BY c.position ) t
Postgres.BuildStrikersJsonQuery: SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(t)), '[]'::json)::text FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(g.playerid::text, g.playertempid::text) AS "playerId", COUNT(*) AS goals FROM goals g JOIN matches m ON m.id = g.matchid WHERE m.championshipid = @championshipId AND g.owngoal = false GROUP BY COALESCE(g.playerid::text, g.playertempid::text) ORDER BY goals DESC LIMIT 20 ) t
